content.query:
Select top 10 * from EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey where Survey_ID='386556'

Select * from EDW.FACT_LEAD where LEADID='HSI-307107'

Select Distinct JobStatus from EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS where Right(JobStatusCategoryID,1)='5'

select * from ODS.MEDALLIA_CUSTOMER_SURVEY where Program like 'In-Home%'--Survey_ID='408117'

Select top 10 * from EDW_DUN.UNI_RULEBOOK_XREF where TableName='DIM_JOB_STATUS' and RuleValue='Reject'

Select top 10 * from EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING

Select top 10 * from EDW.DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT

select top 10 * from edw.dim_erp_branch


elect top 10 * from 

select top 1000 * from EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey where Division='SWR' and SurveyFlag like '%Guild%' and CAST(Response_Date as Date)>='2024-09-01'
and Program like 'Installation%' and ActiveInd='0'





Select top 100 * from EDW.DIM_LEAD_SOURCE

Select top 100 * from EDW.DIM_LEAD_SOURCE_GROUP
Select A.* from ((Select CAST(RESPONSE_DATE as DATE) as ResponseDate_Ori,count(*) as Res_Count from EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey where SurveyFlag='Medallia'
group by CAST(RESPONSE_DATE as DATE)) A left join 
(Select CAST(RESPONSE_DATE as DATE) as ResponseDate,count(*) as ResponseCount from [OUT].[MEDALLIA_CUSTOMER_SURVEY_TEST] group by CAST(RESPONSE_DATE as DATE)
) B on A.ResponseDate_Ori=B.ResponseDate) where B.ResponseDate is NULL

select * from [OUT].[MEDALLIA_CUSTOMER_SURVEY_TEST]

Select count(*) from EDW.DIM_Job_COST_CATEGORY


Alter table [OUT].[MEDALLIA_CUSTOMER_SURVEY_TEST]
Alter column Decided_Against_Other VARCHAR(8000) NULL

Select top 10 * from EDW_DUN.UNI_RULEBOOK_XREF where TableName='DIM_JOB_STATUS' and RuleValue='Reject'

Select top 10 * from EDW_DUN.UNI_STG_LANDING where TableName='DIM_JOB_STATUS' and TableColumnValue='Reject'

Select top 10 * from EDW_DUN.UNI_REF_MAPPING where TableName='DIM_JOB_STATUS' and TableColumnValue='Reject'

Update EDW_DUN.UNI_REF_MAPPING
Set UnifiedValueDesc='Financing rejected by bank'
where TableName='DIM_JOB_STATUS' and TableColumnValue='Reject'

Select top 10 * from ODS.LP_CTA_Lds_Leads

Select top 10 * from ODS.LP_FHI_brp_ProductionBranches
Select top 10 * from [ODS].[LP_PBC_brn_Branches] where LongName='Chicago'

Select * from OUT.MEDALLIA_SALES_EXP_INVITE_GUILD_TEST


Select Survey_ID,MAX()  from EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey

Alter table OUT.MEDALLIA_SALES_EXP_INVITE_GUILD_TEST
ADD BRANCHID NVARCHAR(200) NULL

Select top 10 * from EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS where JobStatus='Reject'

Select top 10 * from [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] where TableName='DIM_JOB_STATUS' and TableColumnValue='Reject'

Select * from  [OUT].[MEDALLIA_CUSTOMER_SURVEY_TEST]


Update EDW_DUN.UNI_RULEBOOK_XREF
Set LastUpdatedTS=GETDATE()
where TableName='DIM_JOB_STATUS' and RuleValue='Reject'

Bank Turn Down
Financing rejected by bank

select * from EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey where CustomerID is NULL and CAST(Response_Date as Date)='2024-08-26'
